name: ECE M.S. Elective Requirements
description: Elective requirements for the ECE Master of Science degree at Carnegie Mellon University.

categories.name: CIT Elective
categories.description: 24 units (or 12 for Intensive Project) of graduate coursework (600+) within CIT departments.
categories.notes: 39-699 and 18-994 count as elective only. Excluded CIT courses may still count toward General Technical Elective.

categories.name: General Technical Elective
categories.description: 12 units of coursework (600+) from approved programs or individually approved courses.
categories.notes: Courses from any of the listed programs, plus individually approved courses.
